title: Shri Lakshmi Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Lakshmi Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Lakshmi.
description:
Om Jai Lakshmi Mata,
Maiya Jai Lakshmi Mata.
Tumko nishidin sevat,
Hari Vishnu Vidhata॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Mata ॥

Uma, Rama, Brahmani,
Tum hi jag-mata.
Surya-chandrama dhyavat,
Narad rishi gaata॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Mata ॥

Durga roop niranjani,
Sukh sampatti data.
Jo koi tumko dhyavat,
Riddhi-siddhi dhan paata॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Mata ॥

Tum Patal-nivasini,
Tum hi shubhdhata.
Karma-prabhav-prakashini,
Bhavnidhi ki trata॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Mata ॥

Jis ghar mein tum rehti,
Sab sadgun aata.
Sab sambhav ho jaata,
Man nahi ghabrata॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Mata ॥

Tum bin yagya na hote,
Vastra na koi paata.
Khaan-paan ka vaibhav,
Sab tumse aata॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Mata ॥

Shubh-gun mandir sundar,
Kshirodadhi-jata.
Ratna chaturdash tum bin,
Koi nahi paata॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Mata ॥

Mahalakshmi ji ki aarti,
Jo koi nar gaave.
Ur anand samave,
Paap utar jaave॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Mata ॥
